content.explanation:
**Going To — Future Plans & Predictions:**

"Going to" का use होता है जब:
1. **पहले से plan बना हुआ हो** (decided before speaking)
2. **Evidence से future predict कर रहे हों** (something obvious is about to happen)

**Structure:**
Subject + **am/is/are + going to** + V1

🇮🇳 मैं अगले महीने दिल्ली जाने वाला हूँ।
🇬🇧 I **am going to** visit Delhi next month. (planned)

🇮🇳 देखो काले बादल हैं — बारिश होने वाली है।
🇬🇧 Look at those dark clouds — it **is going to** rain. (evidence)

**Going To vs Will:**
| Going To | Will |
|----------|------|
| Pre-planned | Spontaneous decision |
| "I am going to study" (planned) | "OK, I will study now" (just decided) |
| Evidence-based prediction | General prediction |
rules: Am/Is/Are + going to + V1 (all subjects: correct be verb)
I → am going to; He/She/It → is going to; We/You/They → are going to
Negative: am/is/are + NOT going to + V1
Question: Am/Is/Are + subject + going to + V1?
Going to = future plans already decided (vs Will = spontaneous)
Going to = evidence-based predictions (vs Will = general beliefs)
Spoken: "gonna" = informal short form of "going to"
content.memoryTrick:
**Going To = Already Decided ✅ OR Evidence Seen 👀**
जब plan पहले से ready हो = Going To
जब कुछ obvious दिख रहा हो = Going To
Will = अभी सोचा, अभी कहा!

examples.hindi: हम कल picnic पर जाने वाले हैं।
examples.english: We are going to go on a picnic tomorrow.
He is going to do an MBA.
Look — he is going to fall!

examples.hindi: क्या तुम party में आने वाले हो?
examples.english: Are you going to come to the party?

examples.hindi: मैं आज chocolate नहीं खाने वाला।
examples.english: I am not going to eat chocolate today.

examples.hindi: उनकी company expand होने वाली है।
examples.english: Their company is going to expand.

mistakes.wrong: I am going to went there.
mistakes.correct: I am going to go there.

speakingTips: Weekly planning: 'This week I am going to practice speaking for 30 minutes daily.'
Evidence prediction: 'Look at the traffic — we are going to be late!'
Career goals: 'I am going to get a promotion by the end of this year.'

vocabulary.example: I am going to plan a road trip.
I intend to improve my English.
The meeting is going to be rescheduled.
We anticipate the project is going to succeed.
I am going to prepare for the upcoming exam.
She is going to take a new initiative.

practice.hindi: मैं कल नई नौकरी के लिए interview देने वाला हूँ।
practice.english: I am going to give an interview for a new job tomorrow.
alternatives: i am going to attend a job interview tomorrow.

practice.hindi: वह इस साल घर खरीदने वाली है।
practice.english: She is going to buy a house this year.
alternatives: she is planning to buy a home this year.

practice.hindi: हम अगले हफ्ते छुट्टी पर जाने वाले हैं।
practice.english: We are going to go on vacation next week.
alternatives: we are going to take a holiday next week.
practice.hint: are going to + go on vacation

practice.hindi: देखो आसमान — बारिश होने वाली है।
practice.english: Look at the sky — it is going to rain.
alternatives: it looks like it is going to rain.

practice.hindi: वह वज़न कम करने वाला है।
practice.english: He is going to lose weight.
alternatives: he is planning to lose weight.

practice.hindi: क्या तुम मुझसे मिलने आने वाले हो?
practice.english: Are you going to come to meet me?
alternatives: are you going to visit me?
practice.hint: Are you going to + base verb ?

practice.hindi: वह अगले महीने से योग शुरू करने वाली है।
practice.english: She is going to start yoga from next month.
alternatives: she is planning to begin yoga next month.

practice.hindi: मैं यह ग़लती दोबारा नहीं करने वाला।
practice.english: I am not going to make this mistake again.
alternatives: i am not going to repeat this mistake.

practice.hindi: वे एक बड़ी पार्टी करने वाले हैं।
practice.english: They are going to throw a big party.
alternatives: they are planning to host a big party.
practice.hint: are going to + throw a party

practice.hindi: क्या तुम्हारी कंपनी नए कर्मचारी रखने वाली है?
practice.english: Is your company going to hire new employees?
alternatives: is your company planning to recruit?

practice.hindi: मैं आज रात जल्दी सोने वाला हूँ।
practice.english: I am going to sleep early tonight.
alternatives: i plan to sleep early today night.

practice.hindi: वह नई कंपनी में जॉइन करने वाला है।
practice.english: He is going to join the new company.
alternatives: he is going to start the new job.

practice.hindi: हम इस प्रोजेक्ट पर मिलकर काम करने वाले हैं।
practice.english: We are going to work on this project together.
alternatives: we plan to collaborate on this project.

practice.hindi: देखो वह कितना थका है — वह गिरने वाला है।
practice.english: Look how tired he is — he is going to fall.
alternatives: he looks so tired, he is about to fall.

practice.hindi: मैं इस साल इंग्लिश सीखने वाला हूँ।
practice.english: I am going to learn English this year.
alternatives: i am planning to learn english this year.
practice.hint: am going to + learn + this year

practice.hindi: वे लोग विदेश में बसने वाले हैं।
practice.english: They are going to settle abroad.
alternatives: they are planning to move overseas.

practice.hindi: क्या तुम घर की मरम्मत करवाने वाले हो?
practice.english: Are you going to get the house repaired?
alternatives: are you going to renovate the house?
practice.hint: Are you going to + get + noun + repaired ?

practice.hindi: उसका व्यापार अगले साल तेज़ होने वाला है।
practice.english: His business is going to grow next year.
alternatives: his business is going to boom next year.
practice.hint: is going to + grow + next year

practice.hindi: हम एक नई शुरुआत करने वाले हैं।
practice.english: We are going to make a fresh start.
alternatives: we are going to start anew.
practice.hint: are going to + make a fresh start

practice.hindi: यह टीम यह मैच जीतने वाली है।
practice.english: This team is going to win this match.
alternatives: this team is going to win the game.
